narrative_beat: Medium of a skinny man with round glasses in soaked Republican uniform, trench of fallen soldiers in monochrome background

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a skinny man in his 40s with round wire-rimmed glasses and tired eyes in a Spanish Civil War trench
subject.focal_point: his face illuminated by low fire glow, looking at bloodstained notebook in his hand
subject.secondary: Republican soldiers in P&B silhouetted behind him. Torn red flag barely visible. Low smoke.

environment.location: a trench in the Aragon front of the Spanish Civil War
environment.time_of_day: late afternoon with distant fire glow

composition.foreground: man's face and notebook in rich ochre and crimson blood tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white trench with monochrome fallen comrades

lighting.rim_light: ochre rim on glasses and collar

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: the writer who saw history rewritten while it happened
symbolism.secondary: war as crucible of the future novel

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
